segments.speaker: 题目17/18
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. Hi, Lisa. Have you managed to set up the new software on your computer? Not yet. I tried installing it, but I keep getting an error message. Did you check if your system meets the software requirements? Yes, my computer is definitely compatible, so I think it might be a network issue. You should contact it support, they can help you sort it out. Good idea. I'll give them a call this afternoon. Let me know how it goes.
